header_comments: Build a dynamic prompt for cron events by embedding the actual event content.
This ensures the model sees the reminder text directly instead of relying on
"shown in the system messages above" which may not be visible in context.
inline_comments: Detect heartbeat-specific noise so cron reminders don't trigger on non-reminder events.
Returns true when a system event should be treated as real cron reminder content.

functions.name: buildCronEventPrompt
functions.doc: "shown in the system messages above" which may not be visible in context.

functions.name: isHeartbeatAckEvent
functions.doc: Detect heartbeat-specific noise so cron reminders don't trigger on non-reminder events.

functions.name: isCronSystemEvent
functions.doc: Returns true when a system event should be treated as real cron reminder content.
